content: Part 1: Replace T3_SUPERBIKE with T3_BIWEEKLY_RIDE in seed.py (new fields, active status, cleanup stale doc)
Part 2: Add T3 scheduler job (alternate Mondays 20:00 UTC)
Part 3: Backend redemption endpoints (POST /api/draws/{draw_id}/redeem + GET redemption status + POST /api/draws/admin/demo-win)
Part 4: DrawCard — handle active physical prize with PHYSICAL PRIZE badge + winner-chooses subline
Part 5: New RedeemPrize page with 3 redemption cards + Delivery/Liquidation/Fleet Yield agreements
Part 6: Route /redeem/:claim_id and DrawDetail → Claim Your Prize for winners
Part 7: Results page — Run T3 now + Demo T3 Win buttons
Verification: restart services, confirm 3 scheduler jobs, seed doc, /redeem endpoint live
